name: iam
context: AWS IAM identity management — roles, policies, users, and access control
info: Manage AWS Identity and Access Management: create/delete users, manage roles and policies, handle access keys, configure MFA, and set up cross-account access. Includes policy document generation and least-privilege analysis.

scripts.name: Create IAM Role
scripts.description: Create an IAM role with a trust policy
scripts.inline:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
aws iam create-role \
  --role-name "$ROLE_NAME" \
  --assume-role-policy-document "$TRUST_POLICY" \
  --description "${ROLE_DESC:-Created by Dojo}"

author: dojo-community
